capabilities.classical_comparison: This is a resource lower bound, not a quantum/classical separation.
capabilities.proved_scope: For uniform involution conjugacy classes, computes exact one-copy Holevo information and certifies same-hidden k-copy lower bounds by entropy subadditivity and Fano's inequality.
capabilities.scope_limit: Prices copies but constructs no measurement, recoupling transform, transition filter, or decoder; the resulting hard-family bound remains polynomial.

capabilities.classical_comparison: No classical analogue is required for this basis-change capability claim.
capabilities.primitive: Quantum Fourier transform over the S_n regular representation
capabilities.proved_scope: Uniform polynomial-time transform from permutation basis to Young/Fourier labels and matrix indices.
capabilities.scope_limit: Acts on one group-algebra register; does not decompose Specht(lambda) tensor Specht(mu).

capabilities.classical_comparison: Not a speedup claim; it is a known circuit primitive in a different tensor decomposition.
capabilities.primitive: Schur-Weyl transform and U(d) Clebsch-Gordan recursion
capabilities.proved_scope: Efficient Schur transforms on qudit tensor powers, with corrected multiplicity-space isometries.
capabilities.scope_limit: Schur-Weyl/U(d) coupling is not the internal Kronecker product of two S_n irreps.

capabilities.classical_comparison: Projection can estimate representation statistics but does not establish a natural-problem separation.
capabilities.primitive: Generalized phase estimation and invariant-space projection
capabilities.proved_scope: Project onto irrep labels or invariant subspaces when the required group action and QFT are efficient.
capabilities.scope_limit: Does not produce a coherent orthonormal basis inside Kronecker multiplicity spaces.

capabilities.classical_comparison: This is a quantum basis-label primitive, not a separation; finite spectra can be reproduced classically and the hard multiplicity-space state dependence remains untouched.
capabilities.primitive: Simultaneous diagonal Young--Jucys--Murphy target-tableau label measurement
capabilities.proved_scope: Measure the target Gelfand--Tsetlin path in V_lambda tensor V_mu using commuting diagonal Jucys--Murphy sums, controlled diagonal S_n actions, and polynomial block encoding at integer spectral gap.
capabilities.scope_limit: The YJM algebra is identity on each g(lambda,mu,nu)-dimensional multiplicity register; it supplies no multiplicity basis, Racah associator, transition filter, or hidden-involution decoder.

capabilities.classical_comparison: Finite multiplicity spectra are classically diagonalized only as verification; no quantum advantage is claimed without an asymptotic gap and natural-problem decoder.
capabilities.primitive: LCU block encoding of bounded-support simultaneous-conjugacy orbit sums
capabilities.proved_scope: Enumerate O(n^5) transposition/transposition and transposition/3-cycle orbit terms and implement each Young-basis factor through the solved S_n QFT and reversible multiplication.
capabilities.scope_limit: Block encoding alone does not imply efficient eigenbasis resolution. The project now proves the needed normalized gap only for xi_n=(n-3,2,1) inside xi_n tensor (n-2,2); other sectors remain unaudited.

capabilities.classical_comparison: A finite simple spectrum is not a separation; classical representation algorithms and normalized-gap scaling must be compared on every source family.
capabilities.primitive: Coherent multiplicity basis from a uniformly gapped commutant Hamiltonian
capabilities.proved_scope: For every n>=7, the xi_n=(n-3,2,1) channel inside xi_n tensor W_n with W_n=(n-2,2) has an explicit n(n-1)(n-2)-term block encoding, a proved normalized gap at least 1/(C n^53), and a polynomial coherent four-valued eigenlabel append by phase estimation.
capabilities.scope_limit: The theorem applies to one declared multiplicity-four channel. It supplies neither unrestricted internal Kronecker decomposition, all-sector routing, Racah associators, nor hidden-involution decoding.

capabilities.classical_comparison: The certificate is an exact classical character-polynomial calculation and makes no separation claim.
capabilities.primitive: Exact bounded intermediate-sector family for one stable three-copy final irrep
capabilities.proved_scope: For W_n=(n-2,2) and final xi_n=(n-3,2,1), exactly nine padded intermediate shapes with fixed multiplicity pairs exhaust the final component for every n>=9, with n=8 closed exactly.
capabilities.scope_limit: Six nontrivial second-stage shape families still lack coherent normalized-gap labels; exact support does not synthesize their transitions or decode the hidden involution.

capabilities.classical_comparison: #BQP membership is not an efficient exact scalar-evaluation or basis-construction algorithm.
capabilities.proved_scope: The multiplicity is the dimension of the image of a composition of implementable commuting projectors.
capabilities.scope_limit: Counts an invariant space; it does not expose its basis or state-dependent transition matrix elements.

capabilities.classical_comparison: Polynomial classical algorithms refute the proposed superpolynomial advantage on many studied families.
capabilities.proved_scope: Quantum algorithms on restricted partition families with sample cost controlled by representation-dimension ratios.
capabilities.scope_limit: Outputs multiplicities under promises; it neither prepares a full Kronecker basis nor decodes a coset ensemble.

capabilities.classical_comparison: No classical comparison is meaningful until a uniform quantum implementation and task are specified.
capabilities.primitive: Coherent internal S_n Kronecker transform with explicit multiplicity basis
capabilities.proved_scope: Defined as a unitary basis change and used schematically in representation-theoretic circuit identities.
capabilities.scope_limit: A definition or circuit box is not a gate synthesis, precision analysis, or state-transition implementation.

capabilities.classical_comparison: Must be compared with classical representation and invariant algorithms after a circuit exists.
capabilities.primitive: Coherent Racah/F-move network for overlapping k-copy S_n subset class sums
capabilities.proved_scope: No unrestricted implementation applicable to the audited hidden-involution frame is established in this ledger.
capabilities.scope_limit: The project proves that one pairwise basis is insufficient at k=3 but has no replacement circuit.

capabilities.classical_comparison: Must beat graph/code invariants and canonicalization on a natural reduction-backed family.
capabilities.primitive: Compressed multi-register measurement outcome to hidden involution
capabilities.proved_scope: No polynomial decoder is established for the symmetric-group involution ensembles under study.
capabilities.scope_limit: Information-theoretic distinguishability, QFT labels, or multiplicity estimates are not a decoder.

claim_gate.reason: A coherent gapped eigenlabel transform is now proved in one stable multiplicity-four channel. Known primitives still stop before unrestricted internal Kronecker transforms, overlapping associators, all-sector routing, state transitions, and decoding; restricted multiplicity advantages are classically eroded.

false_transfer_rules.invalid_to: efficient collective measurement, decoder, or no-algorithm theorem
false_transfer_rules.reason: The bound prices information but the certified hard-family copy count is polynomial.

false_transfer_rules.invalid_to: efficient internal S_n Kronecker transform or hidden-involution decoder
false_transfer_rules.reason: The transforms decompose different group actions and expose different multiplicity data.

false_transfer_rules.from: one stable channel with a proved polynomial coherent eigenlabel transform
false_transfer_rules.invalid_to: unrestricted internal Kronecker transform, overlapping Racah associator, or decoder
false_transfer_rules.reason: The block encoding and normalized-gap theorem are scope-specific; they do not route arbitrary sectors or change coupling trees.

false_transfer_rules.from: polynomial diagonal YJM target-tableau label measurement
false_transfer_rules.invalid_to: coherent Kronecker multiplicity basis, Racah associator, or decoder
false_transfer_rules.reason: The commuting YJM algebra is exactly degenerate on the multiplicity register and cannot choose or manipulate a basis within it.

false_transfer_rules.invalid_to: coherent basis of the invariant space and state-dependent transition amplitudes
false_transfer_rules.reason: Subspace dimension and label projection do not construct a basis-change unitary.

false_transfer_rules.invalid_to: internal tensor product decomposition of arbitrary S_n Specht modules

false_transfer_rules.reason: Many proposed restricted families now have polynomial classical algorithms.

false_transfer_rules.from: large irrep dimension or Kronecker multiplicity
false_transfer_rules.reason: Logarithmic-size quantum registers can encode large spaces; gate lower bounds require proof.

falsifiers_triggered: The S_n QFT is already polynomial and cannot be presented as the missing breakthrough.
Exact Holevo/Fano accounting charges copies but does not construct a collective measurement or decoder.
#BQP multiplicity counting does not construct a coherent Kronecker basis.
Schur-Weyl Clebsch-Gordan circuits do not automatically solve internal Specht tensor products.
Diagonal YJM tableau labels retain exact Kronecker multiplicity degeneracy.
One stable gapped multiplicity label cannot be transferred to unaudited sectors or overlapping trees.
An exact nine-shape sector list does not supply the six missing nontrivial coherent label families.
Many restricted multiplicity speedup candidates have polynomial classical algorithms.
Finite growth of dimensions or multiplicities is not a circuit lower bound.
summary: Classified 13 representation primitives and exact finite Kronecker growth through n=10 without transferring solved QFT/counting results to the open decoder.
